pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 139: random.sample(daytime_indices, 5) samples exactly 5 spike timestamps
setup_task.sh line 53: SPIKE_VALUE = 50000.0; line 145 injects this exact value via feed/insert.json API
export_result.sh line 82: elif val > 4000: status = 'failed_too_high'; task description states 'between 0 W and 4,000 W'
export_result.sh line 79-80 checks val < 0 as 'failed_negative', indicating 0 is the minimum valid value

privileged_info_summary: The task generates synthetic data: a 24-hour solar generation feed (solar_gen) with realistic sine-wave generation values peaking at ~3000 W. Five data points are corrupted with exact spike values of 50,000 W (far exceeding the 3-4 kW system maximum). The task requires agents to identify and fix these 5 spikes by replacing them with valid values between 0 and 4000 W using the Emoncms API.
